headline: Split before review.
stopCondition: Do not release to production until rollback evidence is attached.
heroNextStep: Add a rollback note that explains how production can be restored, then rerun the release readiness check.

reviewMatrix.nextAction: Keep backend assertion attached to the PR.
Keep Bruno smoke coverage attached to the PR.
Keep browser evidence attached to the PR.
Keep the contract smoke request attached to the PR.
Keep DPS-like automation attached to the PR.
